message:
Merge pull request #179 from kubestellar/fix/feedback-workflow-permissions

🐛 Fix Feedback Wanted workflow permissions

files.patch:
@@ -4,6 +4,10 @@ on:
   pull_request:
     types: [closed]
 
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+  pull-requests: write
+
 jobs:
   feedback:
     uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-feedback.yml@main
